NOVALOCK

NovaLock is an Egyptian security-tech company redefining physical protection through digital intelligence. Our smart safes blend military-grade construction with cutting-edge digital logic circuitry, giving homes and businesses the security edge they deserve.

OUR PRODUCT

SECURITY. ENGINEERED BY LOGIC.

NEW 2025 MODEL
NovaLock Safe
The Smart Digital Security Safe
5,000 EGP
+ 1,000 EGP for 2-Year Limited Warranty & Priority Support
  • Digital Logic Technology — Advanced logic circuitry
  • Keyless Security — Custom PIN code with LED display
  • Multi-Point Locking — Cross-bolt secondary security system
  • Tamper Proof — Alarm triggered on forced entry attempts
  • Anti-Drip Construction — Weather-resistant sealed casing
  • Secure-Grip Dial — Precision dial mechanism with NovaLock branding
  • Low Power / High Efficiency — Extended battery operation
  • 24/7 Priority Support — Dedicated customer assistance
WHO IS THIS FOR?

Built for Those Who Have Something to Protect

The NovaLock Safe is engineered for anyone whose valuables, documents, or cash deserve more than a drawer lock.

🏠
Homeowners

Keep cash, jewelry, passports, and property documents safe from theft or unexpected disasters. One investment protects a lifetime of assets.

~68% of safe buyers are homeowners protecting valuables at home
🏢
Small Business Owners

Secure daily cash revenue, contracts, and sensitive employee records on-site. Reduce reliance on bank trips and after-hours vulnerability.

Retail shops, clinics, and pharmacies are among the top buyers
👨‍👩‍👧
Families with Children

Restrict access to medications, personal IDs, or firearms from curious hands. A PIN-locked safe adds a critical layer of household safety.

Child-safety is the #1 reason families first purchase a safe
📁
Document Keepers

Protect irreplaceable paperwork — property deeds, wills, university certificates, and government IDs — from fire, water, and theft.

Legal documents are the most commonly stored item in home safes
💰
Cash-Intensive Businesses

From restaurants to markets, businesses handling daily cash need secure overnight storage. NovaLock's multi-point bolts resist forced entry.

Businesses lose 5x more to internal theft than external — a safe deters both
💎
Jewelry & Gold Owners

In Egypt, gold is wealth. Keeping it under a mattress is a risk no longer worth taking. A digital safe offers real, trackable security.

Gold & jewelry protection is the fastest-growing safe category in Egypt

OUR MISSION

To engineer security solutions that are not just strong, but intelligent. We combine cutting-edge digital logic with robust mechanical design to deliver safes that protect what matters most — your valuables, your documents, your peace of mind. Built in Egypt. Trusted everywhere.
